name: Almond Brickle Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except almond brickle bits.
3. Beat at medium speed until well mixed (2 to 3 minutes).
4. Stir in almond brickle bits.
5. Shape rounded teaspoonsfuls of dough into 1-inch balls.
6. Place the balls 2 inches apart on greased cookie sheets.
7. Flatten each ball to a thickness of 1/4 inch using the bottom of a glass dipped in sugar.
8. Bake for 8 to 11 minutes, or until edges are very lightly browned.
